name: Box
shortDescription: Connect FlowRunner to [Box](https://www.box.com/) to manage cloud files and folders via OAuth2: upload, download, organize, version, comment, task, apply metadata, share, search, manage collaborators, recover from trash, and react to item events in real time.

actions.name: Upload File
actions.description: Uploads a Flowrunner file's contents into a Box folder, creating a new Box file. Use this to push a generated document, export, or attachment into Box. Files must be under 50MB.

actions.name: Get File Info
actions.description: Retrieves the metadata for a single Box file — name, size, parent folder, timestamps, and shared-link status. Use this to inspect a file before acting on it.

actions.name: Download File
actions.description: Downloads a Box file's contents and saves them to Flowrunner file storage, returning the saved file's URL. Box redirects to its download host, which this action follows automatically.

actions.name: Update File
actions.description: Renames a Box file and/or updates its description and tags. Leave a field blank to keep its current value. To move a file to another folder, use Move File instead.

actions.name: Move File
actions.description: Moves a Box file into a different folder. Use this to reorganize files; the file keeps its ID and name.

actions.name: Copy File
actions.description: Copies a Box file into a folder, optionally under a new name. The original is left untouched and a new file is created.

actions.name: Delete File
actions.description: Deletes a Box file. Depending on the account's settings the file is moved to trash or permanently removed. This cannot be undone from here.

actions.name: Create Folder
actions.description: Creates a new folder inside a parent folder. Use this to set up a destination before uploading or moving files.

actions.name: Get Folder Info
actions.description: Retrieves the metadata for a Box folder — name, parent, timestamps, and a preview of its contents. Use this to inspect a folder before listing or modifying it.

actions.name: List Folder Items
actions.description: Lists the files, folders, and web links inside a Box folder, with paging and sorting. Use this to browse a folder's contents or feed downstream actions with item IDs.

actions.name: Update Folder
actions.description: Renames a Box folder and/or updates its description. Leave a field blank to keep its current value. To move a folder, use Move Folder instead.

actions.name: Move Folder
actions.description: Moves a Box folder (and everything inside it) into a different parent folder. The folder keeps its ID and name.

actions.name: Copy Folder
actions.description: Copies a Box folder and all of its contents into a destination folder, optionally under a new name. The root folder (id 0) cannot be copied.

actions.name: Delete Folder
actions.description: Deletes a Box folder. Turn on Delete Contents to remove a non-empty folder and everything inside it; otherwise the call fails if the folder is not empty.

actions.name: Create File Shared Link
actions.description: Creates or updates a shared link on a Box file so it can be shared by URL. Choose who can use the link and whether they can download. Returns the file with its shared-link details.

actions.name: Create Folder Shared Link
actions.description: Creates or updates a shared link on a Box folder so it can be shared by URL. Choose who can use the link and whether they can download its contents. Returns the folder with its shared-link details.

actions.name: Remove Shared Link
actions.description: Removes the shared link from a Box file or folder, revoking URL access. The item itself is not deleted.

actions.name: Add Collaboration
actions.description: Invites a user or group to collaborate on a Box file or folder with a chosen role (Editor, Viewer, etc.). Use this to grant someone access to shared content.

actions.name: Get Collaboration
actions.description: Retrieves a single collaboration by its ID, showing the role, status, who has access, and the item. Pick a folder to populate the collaboration picker.

actions.name: List Folder Collaborations
actions.description: Lists the collaborators on a Box folder — who has access and at what role. Use this to audit sharing or to find a collaboration ID to update or remove.

actions.name: List File Collaborations
actions.description: Lists the collaborators on a Box file — who has access and at what role. Use this to audit sharing or to find a collaboration ID to update or remove.

actions.name: Update Collaboration
actions.description: Changes a collaborator's role on a Box file or folder (for example from Viewer to Editor). Pick a folder to populate the collaboration picker.

actions.name: Remove Collaboration
actions.description: Removes a collaboration, revoking that user's or group's access to the Box file or folder. Pick a folder to populate the collaboration picker.

actions.name: Search Content
actions.description: Searches Box for files, folders, and web links matching a query across names, descriptions, and contents. Use this to locate items when you don't know their IDs.

actions.name: Get Current User
actions.description: Returns the profile of the connected Box user — name, login email, and storage usage. Use this to confirm which account is connected.

actions.name: Upload Large File
actions.description: Uploads a large file (over 50 MB) to Box using the chunked upload API: it creates an upload session, streams the file in parts, and commits it. Use Upload File for smaller files.

actions.name: List File Versions
actions.description: Lists the version history of a Box file. Requires a Box premium account; on free accounts only the current version is returned.

actions.name: Get File Version
actions.description: Retrieves the details of a single version of a Box file. Get version IDs from List File Versions.

actions.name: Promote File Version
actions.description: Promotes an older version of a Box file to be the current version (Box keeps the old versions). Get version IDs from List File Versions.

actions.name: Delete File Version
actions.description: Moves an older version of a Box file to the trash. The current version is unaffected. Get version IDs from List File Versions.

actions.name: Create Comment
actions.description: Adds a comment to a Box file. Use this to leave review notes or feedback on a document.

actions.name: List File Comments
actions.description: Lists the comments on a Box file, with paging. Use this to read feedback or find a comment ID to edit or delete.

actions.name: Get Comment
actions.description: Retrieves a single comment by its ID. Pick a file to populate the comment picker.

actions.name: Update Comment
actions.description: Edits the text of an existing Box comment. You can only edit your own comments.

actions.name: Delete Comment
actions.description: Deletes a Box comment. You can only delete your own comments.

actions.name: Create Task
actions.description: Creates a task on a Box file (for review or completion). Use this to request approval or action on a document from collaborators.

actions.name: List File Tasks
actions.description: Lists all tasks on a Box file. Use this to see outstanding reviews or find a task ID to update or delete.

actions.name: Get Task
actions.description: Retrieves a single task by its ID. Pick a file to populate the task picker.

actions.name: Update Task
actions.description: Updates a Box task's action, message, due date, or completion rule. Leave a field blank to keep its current value.

actions.name: Delete Task
actions.description: Deletes a Box task. This also removes any assignments on it.

actions.name: Create Metadata Instance
actions.description: Applies a metadata template to a Box file, setting its field values. Pick a template from your enterprise templates and supply the field values as a JSON object.

actions.name: Get Metadata Instance
actions.description: Reads the metadata a template has stored on a Box file (its field values). Pick the same template and scope used to apply it.

actions.name: List Metadata Instances
actions.description: Lists all metadata templates applied to a Box file and their stored values. Use this to discover which templates are on a file.

actions.name: Delete Metadata Instance
actions.description: Removes a metadata template (and its values) from a Box file. The file itself is unaffected.

actions.name: List Trashed Items
actions.description: Lists the files and folders currently in the Box trash, with paging and sorting. Use this to find an item to restore or permanently delete.

actions.name: Restore File
actions.description: Restores a file from the Box trash. Optionally rename it or restore it to a different folder if the original name or parent is gone.

actions.name: Restore Folder
actions.description: Restores a folder (and its contents) from the Box trash. Optionally rename it or restore it to a different parent if the original is gone.

actions.name: Permanently Delete File
actions.description: Permanently deletes a file from the Box trash. This cannot be undone. Get IDs from List Trashed Items.

actions.name: Permanently Delete Folder
actions.description: Permanently deletes a folder from the Box trash. This cannot be undone. Get IDs from List Trashed Items.

idealUseCases: Upload or download files between Box and FlowRunner file storage.
Organize, version, comment on, and task content.
Apply metadata and share via expiring, password-protected links.
Manage collaborators and search content before acting on it.
React to Box file, folder, and collaboration events in real time.
agentIdeas: When **Box** "On File Event" fires, use "Download File" and pass the URL to **PDF.co** "Parse Invoice with AI".
Use **Box** "Search Content" to find a report, then **Gmail** "Send Message" to email its link.
After **Box** "Upload File", log the file with **Google Sheets** "Add Row".
